text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...Come on! This is where you call my<n>name! El
Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You know, like a pro wrestler's entrance!<n>Come
on, Trainer, do it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I bet if we did it before a race, the<n>crowd would
get super hyped! Right?<n>Right? Come on, let's do
iiit!
